name: Steam Shortcuts / Native PC

bios.notes: Steam entries are launcher shortcuts and installed application state, not BIOS-based emulation.

library_behavior.playlist_target_preference: Steam shortcut, desktop file, or launch script

frontend_notes.steamdeck: Steam Deck shortcuts may include Proton compatibility settings and artwork/parser metadata.

notes: Do not edit Steam userdata, shortcuts.vdf, compatdata, or cloud-save paths automatically.
Treat Steam as launcher metadata plus installed state, not a ROM folder.
